title: pentacalia poyasensis
intro: Pentacalia poyasensis, also known as the Cape pentacalia, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to South Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pentacalia poyasensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications to promote healing and relaxation.
